//devtools-panels: Browser-IDE limitation: the Flutter DevTools sidebar panels (Inspector / Property Editor / Widget Preview) connect to the Dart VM Service over a DYNAMIC localhost port that can't traverse the Dev Spaces browser gateway, so they show 'can't connect to localhost:<port>'. This is inherent to Flutter DevTools in ANY browser-based IDE (Dev Spaces, Codespaces, Gitpod). Hot reload, breakpoints, the debug console, and editing all work — only these visual panels don't. The settings below keep them from auto-opening in the sidebar so they don't look broken. See the app README.
